The scene shifts to a close-up of a man wearing headphones, looking downward with a focused expression. Later, a hand is shown pressing a button labeled "ACTIVE" on a device attached to a laptop keyboard. The final scene shows a man in darkness, holding binoculars up to his eyes, with another person partially visible beside him.
